summary: W876 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while using W855 comparison-bijectivity route-data constructors to feed W735 closed-map and closed-embedding branch records into the W875 W732 selected-cochain stable-ExactAt route. Product success remains false because the nine concrete W735 branch fields, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W876 moves the latest stable ExactAt boundary to W735 closed-map or closed-embedding branch records, but concrete values for the nine branch fields are still not instantiated.

The W735 branch surface still carries concrete WPP boundary/relation data, target surjectivity/compactness, selected-difference component closedness, mapped-cokernel closedness, normalized fixed-target data, source triangulation data, endpoint strict-topology data, and localized-right-adjoint data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the nine W735 closed-map or closed-embedding branch fields.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
